title: Red Hat Bug Fix Advisory: libxslt bug fix and enhancement update
overview: An update for libxslt is now available for Red Hat Enterprise Linux 10.
description: libxslt is a library for transforming XML files into other textual formats (including HTML, plain text, and other XML representations of the underlying data) using the standard XSLT stylesheet transformation mechanism. Bug Fix(es) and Enhancement(s): libxslt-devel - xsltutils.h mismatched #endif (JIRA:RHEL-107912)
affected_products: Red Hat Enterprise Linux for ARM 64
Red Hat Enterprise Linux for IBM z Systems
Red Hat Enterprise Linux for Power, little endian
Red Hat Enterprise Linux for x86_64 10 x86_64
full_text:
An update for libxslt is now available for Red Hat Enterprise Linux 10.

libxslt is a library for transforming XML files into other textual formats (including HTML, plain text, and other XML representations of the underlying data) using the standard XSLT stylesheet transformation mechanism. Bug Fix(es) and Enhancement(s): libxslt-devel - xsltutils.h mismatched #endif (JIRA:RHEL-107912)
